title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Jordan Topoleski moderates engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discussing AI coding adoption at scale. Panelists share workflow changes, productivity measurement approaches, and organizational strategies including alpha teams and small pod structures.
